top_signals.title: African Development Bank Allots $650 Million for Uganda Railroad
top_signals.summary: Uganda said the African Development Bank has tentatively allocated about $650 million to partly fund the construction of a railway linking the capital, Kampala, to Malaba at the Kenyan border.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SentinelOne stock drops 8% as cyber firm trims headcount to boost AI investments
top_signals.summary: SentinelOne reported earnings after the bell Thursday and issued lackluster guidance for the current quarter and full-year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
